name: Diabetic Homemade Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine evaporated milk and sugar replacement in a bowl.
2. Beat well until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add whole milk and vanilla extract; beat well.
4. Add eggs, beating vigorously into the milk mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker.
6. Freeze according to manufacturer's directions.
Note: 1 serving = 1/2 cup milk, 1/2 lean meat. Calories = 122.
